name: /risk-classify: --dry-run leaves no compliance/risk-classification.yaml on disk (§2.14 dry-run contract)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" --dry-run && ! test -f compliance/risk-classification.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
